welcome.title: Welcome to GeeClaw
welcome.description: Your AI assistant is ready to be configured

welcome.title: Welcome to GeeClaw
welcome.description: GeeClaw is a graphical interface for OpenClaw, making it easy to use AI assistants across your favorite messaging platforms.

issue.title: Environment issue detected
issue.desc: Please ensure OpenClaw is properly installed. Check the logs for details.

provider.label: Model Provider
provider.modelIdDesc: The model identifier from your provider (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
provider.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/coding/v3 and model ark-code-latest. Do not use /api/v3 for Code Plan traffic.
provider.storedLocally: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.

channel.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
channel.subtitle: Choose a platform to connect your AI assistant to. You can add more channels later in Settings.
channel.connectedDesc: Your channel has been configured. It will connect when the Gateway starts.

installing.title: Installing Essential Components
installing.subtitle: Setting up the tools needed to power your AI assistant
installing.wait: This may take a few moments...

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.subtitle: GeeClaw is configured and ready to use. You can now start chatting with your AI assistant.
complete.footer: You can customize skills and connect channels in Settings

startup.shellBody: A simpler startup flow that only asks for what you need.

checkingSession.title: Checking your account...
checkingSession.body: Just a moment while GeeClaw gets ready.
checkingSession.caption: We are confirming your sign-in status before starting the app.

errors.required: Enter an invite code to continue
errors.invalid: That invite code is invalid. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.generic: We could not verify the invite code. Please try again.

authenticated.title: Signed in
authenticated.body: Your account is ready. Next, connect an AI service.
authenticated.bodyNamed: {{name}}, your account is ready. Next, connect an AI service.

preparing.title: Preparing GeeClaw
preparing.body: This may take a little longer the first time.
preparing.caption: First-time preparation can take a few minutes. Please keep this window open.
preparing.captionReturning: Restoring services. This should only take a moment.

needsProvider.title: Connect your AI service
needsProvider.body: Choose an AI provider to start chatting.

status.label: Startup status
status.default: We are preparing a stable AI experience for you.
status.login: One quick sign-in and you are ready to continue.
status.invite: This account still needs an invite code before you can continue.
status.provider: Next up: connect a model provider so GeeClaw can start chatting.
status.error: Something blocked startup, but you can retry from here.

error.title: GeeClaw needs attention
error.body: We could not finish preparing the app. Try again, or check the details below.

recovering.title: Restarting OpenClaw
recovering.body: Some features are temporarily unavailable We will resume automatically once the gateway is back
recovering.caption: This usually takes around ten seconds Please keep this window open

error.title: The OpenClaw Gateway could not recover
error.body: We tried to reconnect the OpenClaw Gateway, but this attempt did not succeed. You can retry now or inspect the details below.
